title: amoCRM Integration
description: Connect amoCRM for automatic lead submission to CRM
descriptionConfigured: Integration is configured and ready to work. Leads are automatically sent to amoCRM.
editingSettingsDesc: Change pipeline, status and responsible user settings.
howItWorksStep2: You will be redirected to amoCRM authorization page
howItWorksStep3: After confirming access, you will return to the application and we will set up the integration
configurationDesc: Authorization successful! Now select pipeline and settings for automatic lead submission.
dataLoadError: Failed to load data from amoCRM. Try reconnecting.
globalConnectionInfo: Your amoCRM account is connected to all projects. You can configure pipeline and settings for each project individually.
disconnectWarningMessage: Are you sure you want to disconnect amoCRM integration?
disconnectWarningNote: Warning: disconnecting will affect ALL projects using this amoCRM account. Leads in all projects will stop being sent to CRM.
